content: Step-wise GRPO’s iterative policy optimization for agent reasoning can be repurposed to progressively prune and refine working-memory traces in tool-based memory operation systems, turning random curiosity-driven memory exploration into structured, reward-aligned memory maintenance. This creates a self-tuning memory system where only memory traces that contribute to consistent, high-reward task completion are retained long-term, eliminating the bloat of uninformative curiosity-acquired memories.
